name: Rachel Feinstein
bio: Rachel Feinstein is an American stand-up comedian and actress known for vivid impressions and storytelling about her liberal mother, her firefighter husband, and the absurdities of family life. A finalist on Last Comic Standing, she released the Comedy Central special Only Whores Wear Purple in 2016 and the Netflix special Big Guy in 2024. She has also appeared in series including Crashing and Inside Amy Schumer.

timeline.ev: Finalist on Last Comic Standing season 7
Releases Comedy Central special Only Whores Wear Purple
Begins recurring role on HBO's Crashing

accolades: Named one of Variety's 10 Comics to Watch (2024)
Netflix special Big Guy reached the U.S. Top 10 TV list (2024)
